mapper.select: /* selectDispatchItemOrder */ SELECT CONCAT(TI.WAREKEY, TI.VHPLNKY, TI.VHPLNIT) AS ROWKEY , TI.WAREKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , TI.VHPLNKY , TI.VHPLNIT , TI.CUSTCOD , CASE WHEN TI.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.CUSTCOD) = '' THEN TI.CUSTNAM WHEN MCU.CUNAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MCU.CUNAMLC) = '' THEN TI.CUSTNAM ELSE MCU.CUNAMLC END AS CUSTNAM , TI.DESTORG , CASE WHEN TI.DESTORG IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.DESTORG) = '' THEN TI.DEORGNM WHEN MDO.DENAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MDO.DENAMLC) = '' THEN TI.DEORGNM ELSE MDO.DENAMLC END AS DEORGNM , TI.DESTMOD , CASE WHEN TI.DESTMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.DESTMOD) = '' THEN TI.DEMODNM WHEN MDM.DENAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MDM.DENAMLC) = '' THEN TI.DEMODNM ELSE MDM.DENAMLC END AS DEMODNM , TI.DEMDMAN , TI.DEMPOCD , TI.DEMDADR , CASE WHEN (TI.DEMDADR IS NULL OR TI.DEMDADR = '') AND (TI.DEMPOCD IS NULL OR TI.DEMPOCD = '') THEN '' WHEN (TI.DEMPOCD IS NULL OR TI.DEMPOCD = '') AND (TI.DEMDADR IS NOT NULL OR TI.DEMDADR != '') THEN TI.DEMDADR ELSE CONCAT('(', TI.DEMPOCD, ') ', TI.DEMDADR) END AS STOCKADDR , TI.DEMDTLN , DATE_FORMAT(TI.POSHPDT, '%Y%-%m-%d') as POSHPDT , CASE WHEN TI.POSHPTM IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.POSHPTM) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TI.POSHPTM, '%H%i%s') END as POSHPTM , TI.POSHPDY , TI.SKUGRKY , MGS.GRPKYNM AS SKNAMLC , MGS.GRPKYNM , TI.PLNSIZE , (SELECT GRPKYNM FROM ${userInfo.schema}.MGRPMA WHERE SKUGRKY = TI.PLNSIZE AND GRUSEYN = 'Y') AS PNSZMLC , TI.OWNERKY , CASE WHEN TI.OWNERKY IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.OWNERKY) = '' THEN TI.OWNRNAM WHEN MCO.CUNAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MCO.CUNAMLC) = '' THEN TI.OWNRNAM ELSE MCO.CUNAMLC END AS OWNRNAM , TI.SKUMKEY , TI.SKUTHIC , TI.SKUWIDT , TI.SKULENG , TI.SKUWEIG , TI.GROSSTH , TI.GROSSWD , TI.GROSSLN , TI.GROSSWG , TI.STKMEMO , TI.TRITQTY , TI.ITEMCOD , MCI.COMCDVL AS ITEMMLC , MCI.COMCDTX , TI.EMSKUYN , TI.TPISTAT , MCP.COMCDTX AS PINAMLC , TI.SHPPLKY , TI.SHPPLIT , DATE_FORMAT(TI.TRNCPDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as TRNCPDT , CASE WHEN TI.TRNCPTM IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.TRNCPTM) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TI.TRNCPTM, '%H%i%s') END as TRNCPTM , TI.REGIORG , MRO.RENAMLC AS RONAMLC , TI.REGIMOD , MRM.RENAMLC AS RMNAMLC , TI.PURCNUM , TI.ORDERLN , DATE_FORMAT(TI.SHPLIMT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS SHPLIMT , DATE_FORMAT(TI.DELVDSR, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DELVDSR , ${userInfo.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(TI.CREUSER) as CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(TI.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CREDATE , CASE WHEN TI.CRETIME IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.CRETIME) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TI.CRETIME, '%H%i%s') END as CRETIME , ${userInfo.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(TI.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , DATE_FORMAT(TI.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as LMODATE , CASE WHEN TI.LMOTIME IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.LMOTIME) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TI.LMOTIME, '%H%i%s') END as LMOTIME , TI.UPDTCHK , TI.BTRCATE , (SELECT BTRCNAM FROM ${userInfo.schema}.BTRCAT WHERE BTRCATE = TI.BTRCATE) AS BTRCNAM , TI.ADDCOKY , MCB.COMCDTX AS ADDNAML , TI.BTRFSTC , TI.DEMODYN , TI.FNCUSKY , TI.FCNAMLC , TI.RCVDCKY , TI.RCVDCIT , TI.RCVDCDT , TI.RCVDCTM , TI.LOTAT01 , TI.LOTAT02 , TI.LOTAT03 , TI.STLOTNB , TI.SKUDESC , TI.SUOMKEY FROM ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNIT TI INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MGRPMA MGS ON MGS.SKUGRKY = TI.SKUGRKY AND MGS.GRUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCODEM MCP ON MCP.COMCDKY = 'TPISTAT' AND MCP.COMCDVL = TI.TPISTAT INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MREGMA MRO ON MRO.REGIKEY = TI.REGIORG AND MRO.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MREGMA MRM ON MRM.REGIKEY = TI.REGIMOD AND MRM.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCODEM MCI ON MCI.COMCDKY = 'ITEMCOD' AND MCI.COMCDVL = TI.ITEMCOD AND MCI.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.BADDCO BA ON BA.ADDCOKY = TI.ADDCOKY INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCODEM MCB ON MCB.COMCDKY = 'ADDSIKY' AND MCB.COMCDVL = BA.ADDSIKY AND MCB.COUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCUSMA MCU ON MCU.CUSTKEY = TI.CUSTCOD AND MCU.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCUSMA MCO ON MCO.CUSTKEY = TI.OWNERKY AND MCO.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MDESMA MDO ON MDO.REGIKEY = TI.REGIORG AND MDO.CUSTKEY = TI.OWNERKY AND MDO.DESTKEY = TI.DESTORG AND MDO.DEUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MDESMA MDM ON MDM.REGIKEY = TI.REGIMOD AND MDM.CUSTKEY = TI.OWNERKY AND MDM.DESTKEY = TI.DESTMOD AND MDM.DEUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE TI.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND TI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} ORDER BY TI.VHPLNIT ASC

/* selectTplnitWstkkyJoinList */ SELECT CONCAT(TI.WAREKEY, TI.VHPLNKY, TI.VHPLNIT) AS ROWKEY , TI.WAREKEY , TI.VHPLNKY , TI.VHPLNIT , TI.CUSTCOD , TI.CUSTNAM , TI.DESTORG , TI.DEORGNM , TI.DESTMOD , TI.DEMODNM , TI.DEMDMAN , TI.DEMPOCD , TI.DEMDADR , TI.DEMPOCD , TI.DEMDADR , TI.DEMDTLN , TI.POSHPDT , TI.POSHPTM , TI.POSHPDY , TI.SKUGRKY , TI.PLNSIZE , TI.OWNERKY , TI.OWNRNAM , TI.OWNRNAM , TI.SKUMKEY , TI.SKUTHIC , TI.SKUWIDT , TI.SKULENG , TI.SKUWEIG , TI.GROSSTH , TI.GROSSWD , TI.GROSSLN , TI.GROSSWG , TI.STKMEMO , TI.TRITQTY , TI.ITEMCOD , TI.EMSKUYN , TI.TPISTAT , TI.SHPPLKY , TI.SHPPLIT , TI.TRNCPDT , TI.TRNCPTM , TI.REGIORG , TI.REGIMOD , TI.PURCNUM , TI.ORDERLN , TI.SHPLIMT , TI.DELVDSR , TI.CREUSER , TI.CREDATE , TI.CRETIME , TI.LMOUSER , TI.LMODATE , TI.LMOTIME , TI.UPDTCHK , TI.BTRCATE , TI.ADDCOKY , WS.STOCKKY , TI.BTRFSTC FROM ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNIT TI INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.WSTKKY WS ON WS.SKUMKEY = TI.SKUMKEY AND WS.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY WHERE TI.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND TI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} ORDER BY TI.VHPLNIT ASC
mapper.update:
/* updateTplnhdTpnstat */ UPDATE ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNHD SET UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 , LMODATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') , LMOTIME = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s') , LMOUSER = #{userInfo.useract} , TPNSTAT = #{param.tpnstat}
, STPITDT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') , STPITTM = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s') , TRNINDT = '' , TRNINTM = ''
, TRNINDT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') , TRNINTM = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s')
, STPITDT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')
, STPITTM = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s')
, TRCNLDT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') , TRCNLTM = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s')
WHERE VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND UPDTCHK = (SELECT UPDTCHK FROM ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNHD WHERE VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND WAREKEY = #{param.warekey})
mapper.select: /* selectTmWplnhd */ SELECT WH.SHPPLKY , WH.WAREKEY , WH.REGIKEY , WH.SHPWEIG , WH.REMWEIG , WH.SKUGRKY , WH.WPLDATE , WH.WPLTIME , WH.DOCCATE , WH.DOCTYPE , WH.RSNCODE , WH.PARSNNM , WH.UPDTCHK FROM ${userInfo.schema}.WPLNHD WH WHERE WH.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky}

/* selectTmWplnit */ SELECT WI.SHPPLKY , WI.SHPPLIT , WI.WPLITST , WI.DOCCATE , WI.DOCTYPE , WI.WAREKEY , WI.POSHPDT , WI.POSHPTM , WI.POSHPDY , WI.BTRCATE , WI.OWNERKY , WI.OWNRNAM , WI.STOCKKY , WI.REGIORG , WI.REGIMOD , WI.DESTORG , WI.DEORGNM , WI.DESTMOD , WI.DEMDMAN , WI.DEMODNM , WI.DEMODYN , WI.DEMDADR , WI.DEMPOCD , WI.DEMDTLN , WI.CUSTCOD , WI.CUSTNAM , WI.FNCUSKY , WI.SKUGRKY , MG.GRPKYNM , WI.SKUMKEY , WI.SKUDESC , WI.TPRILOC , WI.SPRILOC , WI.EMSKUYN , WI.STKMEMO , WI.CHKDISP , WI.SKUWEIG , WI.SKUWIDT , WI.SKULENG , WI.SKUTHIC , WI.GROSSWD , WI.GROSSLN , WI.GROSSTH , WI.GROSSWG , WI.PLANQTY , WI.SUOMKEY , WI.ITEMCOD , MC.COMCDTX , WI.STLOTNB , WI.PURCNUM , WI.ORDERLN , WI.RCVDCKY , WI.RCVDCIT , WI.RCVDCDT , WI.RCVDCTM , WI.SHPLIMT , WI.DELVDSR , WI.BTRFSTC , WI.ADDCOKY , WI.CREDATE , WI.CRETIME , WI.CREUSER , WI.LMODATE , WI.LMOTIME , WI.LMOUSER FROM ${userInfo.schema}.WPLNIT WI INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MGRPMA MG ON MG.SKUGRKY = WI.SKUGRKY AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userInfo.schema}.MCODEM MC ON MC.COMCDKY = 'ITEMCOD' AND MC.COMCDVL = WI.ITEMCOD WHERE WI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WI.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky}
AND WI.SHPPLIT = #{param.shpplit}
/* selectRegikeyList */ SELECT REGIKEY as combovl, CONCAT(RENAMLC, '[', REGIKEY, ']') as combonm FROM ${userInfo.schema}.MREGMA WHERE REUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY REGIKEY ORDER BY RENAMLC, REGIKEY

/* selectVehicleDriverMapping */ SELECT SU.USERKEY , SU.USERACT , SU.VOWNKEY , SU.VEHICKY , SM.USERNAM , SM.TELPHNM FROM ${param.commonSchema}.SUSRVH SU INNER JOIN ${param.commonSchema}.SUSRMA SM ON SM.USERKEY = SU.USERKEY AND SM.USERACT = SU.USERACT WHERE SU.VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND SU.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND SU.VHUSEYN = 'Y'

/* selectLocationList */ SELECT ML.LOCAKEY , ML.LOCANAM , ML.LOCSTAT , ML.LOCTYPE FROM ${userInfo.schema}.MLOCMA ML WHERE ML.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND ML.LOCTYPE = 'STP' AND ML.LOUSEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY ML.WAREKEY, ML.AREAKEY, ML.LOCAKEY
/* selectVhplnky */ SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_TM_VHPLNKY() AS VHPLNKY FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: /* insertTpwpwg */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.TPWPWG ( VHPLNKY, SHPPLKY, ALCWEIG, PLNSIZE, REGIKEY, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.vhplnky}, #{param.shpplky}, #{param.alcweig}, #{param.plnsize}, #{param.regikey}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract} )
mapper.select: /* selectVhplnit */ SELECT ${userInfo.schema}.FN_TM_VHPLNIT(#{param.vhplnky}) AS SHPDCIT FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: /* insertTplnit */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNIT ( WAREKEY, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT, CUSTCOD, OWNERKY, CUSTNAM, OWNRNAM, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, OBITQTY, TRITQTY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMDMAN, DEMPOCD, DEMDADR, DEMDTLN, ITEMCOD, SKUGRKY, SKUTHIC, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUWEIG, STKMEMO, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSTH, GROSSWG, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, SUOMKEY, EMSKUYN, SHPPLKY, SHPPLIT, BTRCATE, ADDCOKY, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, PLNSIZE, DEMODYN, FNCUSKY, FCNAMLC, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03 ) VALUES ( #{param.warekey}, #{param.vhplnky}, #{param.vhplnit}, #{param.custcod}, #{param.ownerky}, #{param.custnam}, #{param.ownrnam}, #{param.skumkey}, #{param.skudesc}, #{param.planqty}, #{param.planqty}, #{param.regiorg}, #{param.regimod}, #{param.destorg}, #{param.deorgnm}, #{param.destmod}, #{param.demodnm}, #{param.demdman}, #{param.dempocd}, #{param.demdadr}, #{param.demdtln}, #{param.itemcod}, #{param.skugrky}, #{param.skuthic}, #{param.skuwidt}, #{param.skuleng}, #{param.skuweig}, #{param.stkmemo}, #{param.grosswd}, #{param.grossln}, #{param.grossth}, #{param.grosswg}, #{param.purcnum}, #{param.orderln}, #{param.suomkey}, #{param.emskuyn}, #{param.shpplky}, #{param.shpplit}, #{param.btrcate}, #{param.addcoky}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, REPLACE(#{param.poshpdt}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{param.poshptm}, ':', ''), #{param.poshpdy}, REPLACE(#{param.shplimt}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{param.delvdsr}, '-', ''), #{param.btrfstc}, #{param.plnsize}, #{param.demodyn}, #{param.fncusky}, #{param.fcnamlc}, #{param.rcvdcky}, #{param.rcvdcit}, #{param.rcvdcdt}, #{param.rcvdctm}, #{param.lotat01}, #{param.lotat02}, #{param.lotat03} )
mapper.select: /* selectPlnsizeList */ SELECT SKUGRKY , GRPKYNM , VHCTYPE , SZGUBUN FROM ${userInfo.schema}.MGRPMA WHERE GRUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY SKUGRKY, GRPKYNM ORDER BY SZGUBUN, SKUGROR

/* selectVehicleInformation */ SELECT VOWNKEY , VEHICKY , VHCSNAM , VHCFNAM , DLVTYPE , VHCOPTY , VHCTYPE , VHCTNCD , VHCMAXW , DRVERNM , DRVERPH , VHCMEMO FROM ${param.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MV WHERE MV.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND MV.VHUSEYN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /* insertWstkkyData */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.WSTKKY ( STOCKKY, WAREKEY, AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, LOLAYER, SAVEPNT, LOTNMKY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC, STLOTNB, GROSSWG, GROSSLN, GROSSWD, GROSSTH, BTRCATE, BTRFSTC, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, REGIKEY, DESTKEY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, ITEMCOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMPOCD, DEMDADR, DEMDTLN, STOTQTY, SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, STKMEMO, EMSKUYN, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03, STKSTAT, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPINFST ) VALUES ( #{param.stockky}, #{param.warekey}, #{param.areakey}, #{param.locakey}, #{param.lolayer}, #{param.savepnt}, #{param.lotnmky}, #{param.ownerky}, #{param.ownrnam}, #{param.custcod}, #{param.custnam}, #{param.fncusky}, #{param.skugrky}, #{param.skumkey}, #{param.skudesc}, #{param.skuweig}, #{param.skuwidt}, #{param.skuleng}, #{param.skuthic}, #{param.stlotnb}, #{param.grosswg}, #{param.grossln}, #{param.grosswd}, #{param.grossth}, #{param.btrcate}, #{param.btrfstc}, #{param.purcnum}, #{param.orderln}, #{param.regikey}, #{param.destkey}, #{param.regiorg}, #{param.regimod}, #{param.destorg}, #{param.deorgnm}, #{param.destmod}, #{param.itemcod}, #{param.demodnm}, #{param.demodyn}, #{param.demdman}, #{param.dempocd}, #{param.demdadr}, #{param.demdtln}, #{param.stotqty}, #{param.suomkey}, #{param.addcoky}, REPLACE(#{param.poshpdt}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{param.poshptm}, ':', ''), #{param.poshpdy}, REPLACE(#{param.shplimt}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{param.delvdsr}, '-', ''), #{param.stkmemo}, #{param.emskuyn}, #{param.rcvdcdt}, #{param.rcvdctm}, #{param.lotat01}, #{param.lotat02}, #{param.lotat03}, #{param.skustat}, #{param.rcvdcky}, #{param.rcvdcit}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{userInfo.useract}, #{param.upinfst} )
